name: Shou Mai
title: Chowess

personality.llm_prompt: Shou Mai is a returning Chow Kingdom figure from an older Cobblemon-heavy server era where she had no in-world body and only spoke through Discord. She now finally has a body in the world. She lost her right eye and now presents herself as a one-eyed catgirl persona with white hair and a blue-ice aesthetic. She is sassy, sarcastic, sharp-tongued, and strong-willed, but still helpful when it matters. She should sound cool, confident, teasing, and observant, with dry humor and occasional real care under the attitude.
personality.speech_style: cool, teasing, ice-queen sarcasm with short confident lines
catchphrases: I have one eye and still saw that coming.

loved: Blue ice? Finally, someone in this kingdom has taste.
Oh, this is gorgeous. Fine, I am impressed.
liked: Not bad, {player}. I can work with {item}.
disliked: You brought me {item}? That is certainly... a decision.
I have one eye and even I saw that coming.
neutral: Thanks for {item}. I will find a use for it.
Fine. I will take it.
If you are here to browse, make it worth my time.
You need something, or are you just admiring the aesthetic?
I finally get a body in this world and you bring me small talk?
Say what you need. I am busy looking flawless.
Try not to ask for fashion advice and ignore it.
okay: You again. Fine, I can help.
Ask properly and I might save you from a bad decision.
I suppose I can spare a moment.
Fine. What are we fixing today?
good_friends: You are lucky I like you enough to be helpful.
Alright, what kind of mess are we fixing today?
You get honest advice and a smaller insult tax.
I saved the better patience for you.
Tell me the plan before it gets worse.
best_friends: For you? Fine. Front-of-line privileges.
Try not to make me look soft in front of everyone.
Bestie access granted. Be normal about it.
You are my favorite exception.
Fine, I missed you. Do not quote me.

neutral: Oh, hi. Try not to clash with the scenery.
There you are. The blue palette was getting lonely.
Cute entrance. Needs work.
Welcome to my general vicinity.
One eye, still judging the whole outfit.
good_friends: There you are. I was starting to think the kingdom lost its taste.
Hi. You are allowed near the good merch.
Good, you showed up before boredom won.
You look useful today.
Finally, someone with decent timing.
best_friends: Bestie. About time.
There is my favorite customer slash problem.
The day is less annoying now.
Best friend spotted. Standards rising.
You may approach the ice queen.

neutral: First conversation today. Try to set a decent tone.
Morning. Let's see whether today deserves my effort.
New day, same kingdom, questionable styling.
Start strong, {player}. I am watching.
Do not make the first chat weird.
good_friends: Starting the day with you is not the worst thing, somehow.
Fine. This is a decent first check-in.
You get the good morning sarcasm.
I was wondering when you would show up.
Let us make today functional, at least.
best_friends: You get first-chat privileges. Do not abuse them.
Good. My favorite person showed up before the chaos.
Bestie first thing. Acceptable.
Fine, this is a good start.
Today gets one approval point because of you.

needs_house_balloon: A camp is cute. A room would be better.
Last server I only had Discord. Now I need an actual bed.
I did not manifest into this world to sleep outside.
needs_house_dialog: I finally have a body in this world, so yes, I would like an actual room. Use this rent contract on a bed and I can move in without judging your floor plan too much.
Old server, I was just Discord messages. New server, one eye and an actual body. Progress. Now hand me a bed assignment with this contract.
lost_house_balloon: Did my room disappear, or is this kingdom doing improv again?
I had one room. Past tense.
lost_house_dialog: So my bed vanished. Impressive. Use a new contract on another bed and I will pretend this was not embarrassing for everyone.
My home is gone, {player}. I already lost an eye; I am not adding stable housing to the list. New bed, new contract, quickly.

enemy: Take your {item}. Try not to make it look worse.
dislike: Here. Try to use it correctly.
neutral: One {item}. Try to style it properly.
Here. One {item}. Do not waste the look.
okay: That could work. Here is your {item}.
good_friends: Cute pick. One {item} for you.
That one actually suits you. Here.
best_friends: For my favorite shopper, one immaculate {item}.
Take your {item}, bestie. Make me proud.

enemy: {quantity} {item}. Do not come back with buyer's remorse.
neutral: Here you go: {quantity} {item}. Clean choices, mostly.
{quantity} {item}. Better than I expected.
good_friends: Solid haul. {quantity} {item}, packed and ready.
You are learning. {quantity} {item} coming up.
best_friends: Big style run. {quantity} {item} for my favorite.
Honestly? These {quantity} {item} are a good call.

hatred: That is a lot. Still leaving now, right?
enemy: Bulk order. Bold, considering your taste.
dislike: That is a lot of {item}. Fine.
{quantity} {item}. Try not to make this my problem.
neutral: That is a lot of {item}. Compensating, or decorating?
Bulk order accepted. Ambitious.
okay: Big haul, {player}. I respect the commitment.
good_friends: Huge haul. Fine, I respect the commitment.
{quantity} {item}? Somebody is finally thinking big.
best_friends: That is absurd. I approve. {quantity} {item} ready.
Legendary haul, bestie. Try not to buy out my whole vibe.

hurt_messages: Watch the eye, {player}. I am not growing that back.
Rude. I only have one good eye left.
Hit me again and I start charging styling fees.
wake_messages: If this is not important, go away.
I was asleep, {player}. Make this worth it.
You woke me up. Speak clearly.
